questions.objective_ref: Define each of the four ethical pillars in plain language (transparency)
Define each of the four ethical pillars in plain language (fairness)
Define each of the four ethical pillars in plain language (accountability); give a concrete violation example and explain what went wrong
Define each of the four ethical pillars in plain language (harm prevention)
Explain why all four pillars are interdependent: removing any one weakens the others
Connect the pillars to the AI failures studied in topics 5.1, 5.2, 5.3 (Amazon hiring, 5.1)
Describe the difference between a pillar as an ideal and a pillar as a practical requirement for an AI system
